# Zamorak 1000% Solo Ranged-Melee (Hybrid) <:range:580168050121113623> <:melee:1096130867279171706>
.img:https://img.pvme.io/images/E9HmNuzAe2.png
*Note: a **Table of Contents** can be found in the pins.*

.
## __Introduction__
.tag:intro
This is an **advanced guide** which assumes a strong underlying knowledge of all mechanics and information presented in <#1020560033173479464> and <#1251104943566491710>.

.
## __Presets and Relics__
.tag:presets
⬥ [Ranged-Melee](https://presets.pvme.io?id=6eb60b81-67a2-40f9-8a12-3b79f0d819bd) <:range:580168050121113623> <:melee:1096130867279171706>
.

.
## __Rotations__
.tag:rotations
⬥ This rotation can achieve sub 4 minute kills, and 9-11 kph.
⬥ Pad order used: **2 → 1 → 4 → 6 → 5 → 3**

.
### __Witches__
**1:** <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>
**2:** <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>
**3:** <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238>
**4:** <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809>
**5:** <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809>
**6:** <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238>

.
### __Phase 1__
<:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:dive:1049378668197195808> + <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>
.
### Witch
<:anti:535541306475151390> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:escape:535541258832052231> + s<:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:barge:535532853916860437> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:res:535541258844635148> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>

.
### __Phase 2__
<:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:rend:1478166426190741584> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>

*Note: change <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> for <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> if enough adrenaline or <:relentless5:712244800920748092> proc.*

.
### Witch
<:anti:535541306475151390> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>

*Note: if <:crack4:712073087662686249> proc skip <:snipe:1478061857486143498>*

.
### __Phase 3__
<:devo:513190158728953857> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:dive:1049378668197195808> + <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:grico:787904334812807238> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>
.
### Witch
<:anti:535541306475151390> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:escape:535541258832052231> + s<:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:barge:535532853916860437> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:res:535541258844635148> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>

.
### __Phase 4__
<:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:debil:535541278264393729> → <:rend:1478166426190741584> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:rend:1478166426190741584> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>
.
### Witch
<:anti:535541306475151390> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>

*Note: if <:crack4:712073087662686249> proc skip <:snipe:1478061857486143498>*

.
### __Phase 5__
<:debil:535541278264393729> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:dive:1049378668197195808> + <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:limitless:641339233638023179> + <:devo:513190158728953857> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → clear mine + <:freedom:535541258240786434> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:grico:787904334812807238> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>
.
### Witch
<:anti:535541306475151390> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:escape:535541258832052231> + s<:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:barge:535532853916860437> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:res:535541258844635148> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>

.
### __Phase 6__
<:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:debil:535541278264393729> → <:reflect:535541258786177064> / <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → (<:punish:535532879439069184>)

*Note: <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> if grey LP is too high.*

.
### __Phase 7__
**Demon**
<:demonslayer:641339921675845633> + <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:cane:535532878969438210> + <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538>
**Zamorak**
<:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:disrupt:535614336207552523> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>
**Rune 1**
<:grico:787904334812807238> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>
**Rune 2**
<:snapshot:1478061855732666439>
**Zamorak**
<:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> / <:snapshot:1478061855732666439>

<:perfectequilibrium:1006119102814887957> at 1: <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>
